{{Infobox location
| name = Ninecloud City
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Ninecloud City Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ninecloud]] City is one of the largest metropolises in the world and serves as the capital of the [[Ninecloud]] country. It is characterized by its vibrant, glistening appearance, featuring numerous colorful jeweled towers and buildings that often glow with a rainbow radiance. The city is home to the [[Ninecloud Court]], which includes impressive structures such as a crystalline viewing tower made of stained glass and [[Forged madra]], as well as a [[Monarch platform]] consisting of a jeweled palace resting upon a rainbow-colored cloud. The city's aesthetic and power are deeply tied to the Sha bloodline, whose spiritual mutation allows for the control of others' spirits and manifests as rainbow-colored [[madra]]. This sigil, a nine-colored cloud, also provides the name for both the nation and its continent. The city is protected by various security measures, including protective constructs and specialized peacekeepers of the [[Underlord]] rank. Governance and communication within the city are often facilitated by the [[Ninecloud Soul]], a feminine voice that announces events, manages security procedures, and interacts with guests. Additionally, the city's infrastructure supports various forms of travel, including cloudship docks and hangars designed for large cloud fortresses.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ninecloud City]] is one of the largest cities in the world and serves as the capital of the [[Ninecloud]] country.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ninecloud City]] contains an alley where the [[Monarch]] was found.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud]] City is a location characterized by glistening, brightly colored towers and structures spread beneath a rose-tinted crystal roof. This city features hangars for cloudships, world-renowned entertainment venues, and the [[Akura building]], while also housing the tree for the [[Heart-Piercer Fruit]]. As a place with its own laws, it hosts celebrations during the [[Uncrowned]] tournament and contains a guest tower belonging to [[Northstrider]]. During certain events, an invisible column restriction settles around the city, and four [[Monarchs]] are bound to the area. Following these developments, [[Reigan Shen]] was sent flying out of the city, and [[Lindon]] and his companions emerged within its borders.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] is a collection of jewels spread out beneath the rose-tinted crystal roof.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] contains glistening structures and is the location of the [[Akura building]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] features brightly colored and glowing towers and buildings.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] has a guest tower in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] holds celebrations during the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] has hangars for cloudships.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] has many world-renowned entertainment venues.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] has its own laws.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The tree for the [[Heart-Piercer Fruit]] is located in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The restriction settled in an invisible column surrounding [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ninecloud City]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Four [[Monarchs]] are bound to [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] was sent flying out of [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] and the others emerged in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Air travel away from [[Ninecloud City]] is currently restricted.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ninecloud City]] has records.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ninecloud City]] is a location where [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] worked together.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Weeping Dragon]] was reported to be heading toward [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ninecloud City]] is a location where [[Uncrowned King competitors]] have used towers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sha Miara]] is far from [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The crowd in the new world was less colorful than one might expect in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It comes from one tree that blooms once a year in a single garden in Ninecloud City.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
